title: More Copper Golems
description: Introducing... More Copper Golems! A Datapack that adds a glorious army of slightly-confused-but-totally-enthusiastic copper buddies to protect your domain.
body:
**Tired of stacking up literal mountains of copper blocks, *Waxed Semi-Oxidized Kinda-Cut Almost-Exposed Copper Slabs™* and still not knowing what to do with them?**  
Introducing... **More Copper Golems!** A datapack that adds a glorious army of slightly-confused-but-totally-enthusiastic copper buddies to protect your domain.

---

## Heavy Copper Golem

![Heavy Copper Golem - Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5c2ab4ee4cba2480080112fee9d01856eb1e402_0.webp)

This tanky beast is all about endurance — think Iron Golem, but way cheaper and **200% more orange**.  
It can **yeet enemies into orbit** or **bonk them** with a *Certified™ Waxed Exposed Boulder of Justice (now with Extra Shine)*. Heavy Copper Golem remains the name — we didn’t touch that one, promise.

![Heavy Copper Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9c480d20796470591927d74623b8f4bdc339f87.png)

*Disclaimer: unfortunately it cannot be crafted from Waxed Exposed Super-Duper Almost-Oxidized Cut Copper Stairs With Extra Shine™ … yet.*
